name: Deep-Eyes White Dragon, the Blue Abyss
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>蒼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あお</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>深</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>淵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ディープアイズ・ホワイト・ドラゴン
name_jp_rom: Ao no Shin'en Dīpuaizu Howaito Doragon
desc:
(This card is always treated as a "Blue-Eyes" card.)
You can discard this card; add 1 Level 1 LIGHT Tuner from your Deck to your hand. If a "Blue-Eyes" Ritual Monster(s) and/or "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" is sent to your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 of them; Special Summon this card from your GY (if it was there when the monster was sent) or hand (even if not), and if you do, its ATK becomes that monster's, also banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Deep-Eyes White Dragon, the Blue Abyss" once per turn.

action: Activates if other cards are sent to the Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
